title: dodonaea subglandulifera
intro: Dodonaea subglandulifera, also known as the small-leaved hopbush or small-leaved dodonaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Dodonaea subglandulifera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
